topic: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional

drills.title: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional — Speaking Set 1

sentences.english: If I had money, I would buy this house.
sentences.hindi: अगर मेरे पास पैसे होते, तो मैं यह घर खरीदता।
sentences.pronunciation: if i had money i would buy this house

sentences.english: If I were you, I would not do this.
sentences.hindi: अगर मैं तुम होता, तो मैं यह नहीं करता।
sentences.pronunciation: if i were you i would not do this

sentences.english: If she knew, she would come.
sentences.hindi: अगर उसे पता होता, तो वह आती।
sentences.pronunciation: if she knew she would come

drills.title: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: If I had time, I would travel.
sentences.hindi: अगर मुझे समय मिलता, तो मैं travel करता।
sentences.pronunciation: if i had time i would travel

sentences.english: If I had worked hard, I would have passed.
sentences.hindi: अगर मैंने मेहनत की होती, तो मैं पास हो जाता।
sentences.pronunciation: if i had worked hard i would have passed

sentences.english: If you had told me, I would have helped.
sentences.hindi: अगर तुमने मुझे बताया होता, तो मैं मदद करता।
sentences.pronunciation: if you had told me i would have helped

drills.title: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional — Speaking Set 3

sentences.english: If he had come early, we would have met.
sentences.hindi: अगर वह जल्दी आया होता, तो हम मिल पाते।
sentences.pronunciation: if he had come early we would have met

sentences.english: If I had known the mistake, I would have corrected it.
sentences.hindi: अगर मुझे गलती पता होती, तो मैं इसे सुधार देता।
sentences.pronunciation: if i had known the mistake i would have corrected it

sentences.english: If the weather were good, we would go out.
sentences.hindi: अगर मौसम अच्छा होता, तो हम बाहर जाते।
sentences.pronunciation: if the weather were good we would go out

drills.title: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional — Speaking Set 4

sentences.english: If he had asked me, I would have told him.
sentences.hindi: अगर उसने मुझसे पूछा होता, तो मैं बता देता।
sentences.pronunciation: if he had asked me i would have told him

sentences.english: If I had a car, I would go to office every day.
sentences.hindi: अगर मेरे पास कार होती, तो मैं रोज ऑफिस जाता।
sentences.pronunciation: if i had a car i would go to office every day

sentences.english: If we had started earlier, we would have finished.
sentences.hindi: अगर हमने पहले शुरू किया होता, तो हम खत्म कर लेते।
sentences.pronunciation: if we had started earlier we would have finished

drills.title: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional — Speaking Set 5

sentences.english: If you were happy, I would be happy too.
sentences.hindi: अगर तुम खुश होते, तो मैं भी खुश होता।
sentences.pronunciation: if you were happy i would be happy too

sentences.english: If he had paid attention, this mistake would not have happened.
sentences.hindi: अगर उसने ध्यान दिया होता, तो यह गलती नहीं होती।
sentences.pronunciation: if he had paid attention this mistake would not have happened

sentences.english: If I were a pilot, I would travel the world.
sentences.hindi: अगर मैं pilot होता, तो मैं दुनिया घूमता।
sentences.pronunciation: if i were a pilot i would travel the world

drills.title: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: If he had called me, I would have come.
sentences.hindi: अगर उसने मुझे फोन किया होता, तो मैं आ जाता।
sentences.pronunciation: if he had called me i would have come

sentences.english: If you were in my place, what would you do?
sentences.hindi: अगर तुम मेरी जगह होते, तो क्या करते?
sentences.pronunciation: if you were in my place what would you do

sentences.english: If I had gotten this chance earlier, I would have taken it.
sentences.hindi: अगर मुझे यह मौका पहले मिला होता, तो मैं ले लेता।
sentences.pronunciation: if i had gotten this chance earlier i would have taken it

drills.title: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional — Speaking Set 7

sentences.english: If he were honest, I would trust him.
sentences.hindi: अगर वह ईमानदार होता, तो मैं उस पर भरोसा करता।
sentences.pronunciation: if he were honest i would trust him

sentences.english: If we had planned, this problem would not have happened.
sentences.hindi: अगर हमने योजना बनाई होती, तो यह समस्या न होती।
sentences.pronunciation: if we had planned this problem would not have happened
